title: Xtra Smoky Greek Cabbage Dolmades
description: A smoky and savory Greek dish featuring cabbage leaves stuffed with a mix of cheese, spices, and smoked ingredients, perfect for a date night, and halal-friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and blanch the cabbage leaves for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked onion and garlic, feta cheese, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and dried dill weed, and mix well.
To assemble the dolmades, lay a cabbage leaf flat and place a tablespoon of the cheese mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end of the leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a neat package.
Repeat with the remaining cabbage leaves and filling.
In a large saucepan, combine the dolmades, seam-side down, in a single layer, and add enough water to cover them.
Bring the water to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Serve the dolmades hot, with a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of smoked paprika.
